summary: Pod Health Indicators feature testing completed successfully. All 14 backend API tests passed. All frontend Playwright tests passed. Pod health (green/yellow/red with label and reason) displays correctly on Priority Alert cards, Athletes Needing Attention cards, and in the Peek Panel.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing MOCKED athlete/intervention data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pod Health feature fully working. Data-testids: alert-pod-health (on priority alert cards in owner row), pod-health-dot (on athletes needing attention cards in meta row), peek-pod-health (in peek panel at bottom below score line). Pod health structure: { status: 'green'|'yellow'|'red', label: 'Healthy'|'Needs Attention'|'At Risk', reason: 'human-readable string' }. Health calculation in explain_pod_health() uses 5 signals: daysSinceActivity (>21=red, >7=yellow), intervention count (>=3=red, >=2=yellow), has_blocker, has_ownership_gap, has_critical. Known test athletes: athlete_3 (Emma Chen, 28 days inactive) = red/At Risk, athlete_5 (Olivia Anderson, has blocker) = yellow/Needs Attention, athlete_12 (Liam Moore, ownership gap) = yellow/Needs Attention, athlete_16/17 (Mason White, Amelia Harris) = green/Healthy.
mocked_api_note: All athlete/intervention data is MOCKED (mock_data.py). Pod health is derived from mock data signals, no DB queries.

priority_alerts_pod_health: Each priority alert has pod_health object
pod_health has status, label, reason fields
pod_health.label matches status (green=Healthy, yellow=Needs Attention, red=At Risk)
athletes_needing_attention_pod_health: pod_health has required fields (status, label, reason)
pod_health_signal_logic: Athletes with 21+ days inactive are red/At Risk (Emma Chen: 28 days)
Athletes with active blockers are yellow/Needs Attention (Olivia Anderson)
Athletes with ownership gaps are yellow/Needs Attention (Liam Moore)
Healthy athletes are green/Healthy with appropriate reason
data_integrity: pod_health addition doesn't remove existing fields
Same athlete across multiple alerts has consistent pod_health

priority_alerts: 4 pod health badges found on priority alert cards
Alert pod health shows dot + label (e.g., 'Needs Attention')
Dot color matches status (bg-amber-400 for yellow, bg-red-500 for red)
athletes_needing_attention: 12 pod health dots found on athlete cards
Pod health badge in meta row with owner info
Title attribute shows reason on hover
Red (At Risk): 2 athletes, Yellow (Needs Attention): 8 athletes, Green (Healthy): 2 athletes
peek_panel: Pod health section at bottom of peek panel (below score line)
Secondary to main content (why/what_changed/action/owner still primary)
existing_functionality: Athletes needing attention section loads correctly
Peek panel opens on card click
Primary content (why, what_changed, recommended_action) still visible
Open Support Pod button navigates correctly
Support Pod page loads with context
